# JobSpeeder

> JobSpeeder is a French-language SaaS platform that automates job applications
> using AI. Users upload a CV, the system optimises it for ATS filters via
> GPT-4o-mini, then an n8n + Skyvern automation pipeline applies to matching
> job offers 24/7 on the user's behalf.

## Description

JobSpeeder lets job seekers in France and worldwide apply to up to 1 500 jobs
per month without manual effort. After a 3-minute onboarding, the platform
continuously scans 10 000+ offers per day, personalises each application with
the user's optimised CV profile, and dispatches applications via email or
automated browser form-filling (Skyvern). A real-time dashboard tracks every
application and its status.

## How It Works

1. Upload CV — Import an existing PDF/DOCX or build one with the integrated editor.
2. AI Optimisation — GPT-4o-mini rewrites the CV to maximise ATS scores and recruiter appeal.
3. Set Preferences — Define target job title, location, work mode, contract type, salary range.
4. Automatic Applications — The n8n + Skyvern pipeline applies 24/7 to matching offers.
5. Track Results — Dashboard shows sent / pending / interview status for every application.

## Features

- AI CV optimisation (GPT-4o-mini, ATS keyword density, action-verb rewrites)
- Multi-profile CV management (1–15 profiles depending on plan)
- Automated application dispatch: email, Skyvern browser automation, LinkedIn (Beta)
- Job offer aggregation: 10 000+ offers analysed daily across 70+ countries
- n8n webhook integration — automation engine that triggers per-user campaigns
- Application tracking dashboard with status: Envoyée / En attente / Entretien
- Automatic follow-up emails (Platinum & Elite plans)
- Chrome extension for LinkedIn (Platinum & Elite, Beta)
- Stripe-powered subscription management with self-serve plan changes
- 7-day money-back guarantee on first paid subscription

## Target Users

French-speaking job seekers who want to scale their job search without spending
hours applying manually. Typical profiles: recent graduates, career changers,
active job seekers targeting CDI/CDD/Freelance/Stage contracts in France, Europe,
or internationally.

## Pricing

| Plan     | Monthly | Annual (per month) | Applications/month |
|----------|---------|--------------------|--------------------|
| FREE     | 0 €     | 0 €                | 20                 |
| GOLD     | 29 €    | 23 €               | 150                |
| PLATINUM | 59 €    | 47 €               | 500                |
| ELITE    | 149 €   | 119 €              | 1 500              |

Annual billing saves 20%. Plans can be changed or cancelled at any time.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://jobspeeder.online
- Pricing: https://jobspeeder.online/pricing
- Register (free): https://jobspeeder.online/register
- Login: https://jobspeeder.online/login
- Dashboard (authenticated): https://jobspeeder.online/dashboard
- CV Manager (authenticated): https://jobspeeder.online/cv
- Job Offers (authenticated): https://jobspeeder.online/job-offers
- Applications Tracker (authenticated): https://jobspeeder.online/applications
- Settings (authenticated): https://jobspeeder.online/settings
- Privacy Policy: https://jobspeeder.online/confidentialite
- Terms of Service: https://jobspeeder.online/cgu
- Cookie Policy: https://jobspeeder.online/cookies
- Contact: info@jobspeeder.online

## Tech Stack

- Frontend/Backend: Next.js 14 (App Router), deployed on Vercel
- Auth & Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Row Level Security)
- AI: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini (CV optimisation, ATS rewriting)
- Automation engine: n8n (self-hosted at n8n.jobspeeder.online)
- Browser automation: Skyvern (form-filling on job sites)
- Payments: Stripe (subscriptions, billing portal, webhooks)
- UI: Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Lucide icons
- Language: French (fr-FR), interface fully localised
